docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,499.00 FILED BY CHIMA, CHIKODI AS TO DEFENDANT FYADEV, ARTEM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED OCT-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FYADEV, ARTEM
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF TO DISMISS DEFENDANT, ARTEM FYADEV AND TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM ADDING A NEW DEFENDANT AND UPDATE JUDGMENT AMOUNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIMA, CHIKODI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-25-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHIKODI CHIMA. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ARTEM FYADEV. PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM TO NAME CORRECT DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIMA, CHIKODI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRABR, INC. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $172.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,172.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JANUARY 25, 2017 AT 3:30. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO DISMISS ARTEM FYADEV AND ADD THE PROPER DEFENDANT, GRABR INC. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHIMA, CHIKODI AS TO DEFENDANT GRABR, INC.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHIMA, CHIKODI
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIMA, CHIKODI AS TO DEFENDANT FYADEV, ARTEM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $97.50 SERVED DEC-18-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GRABR, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CHIKODI CHIMA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GRABR, INC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
